name: SolarTrack Pro
description: Developed a full-stack IoT-based solar tracking system using ESP32, React, Node.js, MongoDB, and FastAPI, featuring real-time monitoring, historical analytics, machine learning-based angle prediction, and automated dual-axis control.

name: Wastewater Treatment Dashboard
description: Developed a real-time IoT dashboard using ESP32, Node.js, and WebSockets to monitor wastewater quality (pH, turbidity, temperature) with a Random Forest ML classifier for automated water treatment classification and live actuator control.

name: MedAI Clinical System
description: Developed a healthcare management platform using Python, FastAPI, and SQLite with AI-based medicine recommendations, patient risk analysis, prescription tracking, clinical record management, and RESTful APIs.
